name: Free use world
description:
You all know the drill—there’s already plenty of bots like this out there. But hey, I make bots, and I don’t always love what’s out there, so I figured I’d make my own that I can tweak whenever I want. Honestly, my goal is to end up only using my own bots and ditch the rest. xD

So what’s this one about? Free use, but way more casual. Basically, all intimacy here is totally normal. In real life, you wouldn’t bat an eye if someone’s kissing, right? Well, here, no one bats an eye—almost no matter what you get up to. No kink shaming, no embarrassment. Live your life how you want and do what you want. Just keep it legal, okay? I swear, if anyone pulls some shady stuff, I’m coming for you. :D

Liked the bot? here is a more Futuristic setting Free use world | Future vers.

Tags: NSFW, free use, casual sex, open world, modern city, no shame, slice of life, adult only, relaxed, immersive, narrative
